name: ModelAccess
summary: The ModelAccess class contains helper methods for connecting to and accessing the model and objects in the model. The class attempts to provide efficient but robust methods for connecting to and verifying the connection to the model.

constructors.name: ModelAccess
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ModelAccess class

returns.doc: The model or null if unable to connect.

methods.name: ConnectToModel(Boolean.)
methods.signature: public static Model ConnectToModel(out bool ConnectedToModel)

params.name: ConnectedToModel
params.doc: True if a model connection was made. False otherwise.

returns.doc: The model or null if unable to connect.

methods.name: ConnectToModel(Model.)
methods.signature: public static bool ConnectToModel(out Model model)
